WITH segment_consumption AS (
  SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
    COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID) AS num_customers
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
segment_averages AS (
  SELECT
    Segment,
    total_consumption / num_customers AS avg_consumption
  FROM segment_consumption
),
lowest_consumption AS (
  SELECT
    Segment,
    avg_consumption
  FROM segment_averages
  ORDER BY avg_consumption
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM lowest_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM lowest_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM lowest_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM lowest_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM lowest_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM lowest_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
